LanguageData.CP_NotConnectedToConsole: Rail must connect to a cluster projection console or a valid rail chain.
LanguageData.CP_RailMustStayStraight: Auto assembly rails must stay straight and axis-aligned.
LanguageData.CP_NoValidLaunchArea: No valid launch area found between orthogonal rails.
LanguageData.CP_LoadSteelDesc: Load available steel into the cluster projection console.
LanguageData.CP_EjectSteelDesc: Eject all stored steel onto the ground.
LanguageData.CP_EjectFuelDesc: Eject all stored chemfuel onto the ground.
LanguageData.CP_AssemblyAndLaunchDesc: Assemble all launchable buildings in the launch area into cluster pods.
LanguageData.CP_NoLaunchableBuildings: No launchable buildings found in the launch area.
LanguageData.CP_NotEnoughFuel: Need {0} chemfuel to travel at least 1 world tile. Stored: {1}.
LanguageData.CP_LaunchClusterDesc: Select a destination world tile and launch all assembled cluster pods after a short countdown.
LanguageData.CP_NoClusterPodsReady: No assembled cluster pods are currently in the launch area.
LanguageData.CP_LaunchAreaRoofed: The launch area must be unroofed before launch.
LanguageData.CP_NotEnoughFuelForLaunch: Need {0} chemfuel for this launch. Stored: {1}.
LanguageData.CP_LaunchCountdownStarted: Launch countdown started: {0} seconds for {1} pods.
LanguageData.CP_ClusterArrived: Cluster pods have arrived at the target tile.
LanguageData.CP_ExpansionTankUnlinked: Not linked to a cluster projection console.
